text:
hould there be Ketu in the 7 from Lagn Pad, receiving a Drishti from,
or being yuti with another malefic, the native will be adventurous, will have
(prematurely) grey hair and a big male organ.
th
25. Should one, two, or all three of Guru, Śukr and Candr be in the 7 from
Lagn Pad, the native will be very wealthy.
th
26. Whether a benefic, or a malefic, if be exalted in the 7 from Lagn Pad,
the native will be affluent and be famous.
th
27. O Brahmin, these Yogas, as narrated by me with reference to the 7
nd
from Lagn Pad, should also be considered from the 2 of Lagn Pad.
nd
28. Anyone of Budh, Guru and Śukr being exalted in the 2 from Lagn Pad
and being with strength will make the subject rich.
29. The Yogas so far stated by me with reference to Lagn Pad be similarly
evaluated from Karakāńś as well.
nd
30-37. General. If Budh is in the 2 from Arudh Lagn, the native will Lord
nd
over the whole country. Śukr in the 2 from Lagn Pad will make one a
poet, or a speaker.
